summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SilkZé Kanban production management system. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend functionality mostly working with minor UI interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Error message not displaying for wrong password attempts
Modal overlay blocking clicks on background elements when sheet is open
Delete confirmation dialog not properly handled

integration_issues.issue: Search results not properly filtered or timing issue with display

passed_tests: Backend: All 10 API endpoints (login, auth, CRUD, search, backup)
Frontend: Pedido sheet opens and closes
Frontend: All 6 tabs navigation (Info, Orcamento, Grade, Check, Imagem, Layout)
Frontend: Form field editing and validation
Frontend: Orcamento calculations and item management
Frontend: Grade table with adult/child sizes
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay issue preventing clicks when pedido sheet is open. Implement proper error message display for login failures. Address delete confirmation dialog handling.
